name: PTT MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for PTT (批踢踢實業坊) — Taiwan's largest BBS (Bulletin Board System) with over 1.5 million registered users and a central role in Taiwanese internet culture. From the PyPtt organization (official Python PTT client maintainers). Enables AI agents to read PTT boards, search posts, retrieve article content, and monitor Taiwanese online discourse.
use_cases: Reading PTT board posts and articles from content monitoring agents
Searching PTT for topic discussions from market research agents
Monitoring Taiwanese public opinion on PTT from media intelligence agents
Accessing PTT forum content for Taiwanese market analysis from research agents
not_for: Non-Taiwanese market monitoring (PTT is Taiwan-specific content)
Posting to PTT without proper account management
Teams targeting mainland Chinese platforms (different ecosystem from Weibo/Toutiao)
best_when: A Taiwan-focused team wants AI agents to monitor PTT discussions, research public opinion, or analyze content from Taiwan's most influential online forum.
avoid_when: You target non-Taiwanese markets. PTT content is primarily in Traditional Chinese. Also: PyPtt is a respected community project, but PTT API access has usage restrictions.

auth.notes: PTT account credentials required. PTT account registration at ptt.cc.

pricing.free_tier_limits: PTT is free to access with an account
pricing.notes: PTT is free. MCP server is free open source from PyPtt community.

performance.rate_limits: PTT connection limits — don't abuse; PTT may ban IPs

known_agent_gotchas: PTT Telnet/WebSocket protocol — PyPtt handles the protocol but may have quirks
PTT may block aggressive bot-like access — implement rate limiting and respectful scraping
PTT credentials are for individual accounts — sharing credentials violates PTT ToS
Content is primarily Traditional Chinese — ensure agents can handle Chinese text properly
agent_readiness.security_notes: PTT account credentials. TW data residency (NTU servers). PTT is public BBS — content is publicly accessible. Respect PTT community norms and rate limits.

security_score_components.security_notes: Account credentials required. TW data residency. Public forum content. Respect rate limits.
